# PR Insight: Ascend/samples #2735

**Title:** simplify sim mode generated files * simplify sim mode generated files

## Overview
This PR simplifies files generated in simulation mode. The change reduces complexity and improves the simulation workflow for developers without access to actual Ascend hardware.

## Technical Significance
Simulation mode is essential for development and testing without hardware. Simplifying generated files makes simulation easier to use and reduces compilation overhead during development iterations.

## Related
- Simulation patterns, development workflow patterns
